=== Raw Response ===
[APPBOT_TOOL_CALL_BEGIN]{"id":"tc_read_001","argv":["file","read","CLAUDE.md"]}[APPBOT_TOOL_CALL_END]
[APPBOT_TOOL_CALL_BEGIN]{"id":"tc_read_002","argv":["file","read",".\.wkappbot\ask\20260417-0743-gemini-fallback-claude-rate-limit-continue-fro.md"]}[APPBOT_TOOL_CALL_END]Handoff AssessmentBlocked Command: eye tick is currently unavailable in the host's loop mode. I will rely on file system checks and logs for state verification.Context Discovery: CLAUDE.md and the most recent fallback session file are being retrieved to identify the precise point of failure and the nature of the -9999 error code.Immediate Focus: The previous agent mentioned a specific Slack "self-mention" routing issue where messages are posted successfully but fail to trigger internal routing. I'll prioritize identifying if this caused the process exit.I am now reading the project's operational state to determine the next development or fix step.
